description: Rillet is an AI-native ERP and general ledger platform for finance teams at scaling companies. It supports accounting workflows such as general ledger, accounts receivable and payable, bank reconciliation, close management, and reporting.
summary: Rillet exposes a bearer-authenticated HTTP accounting API at `https://api.rillet.com` (with sandbox at `https://sandbox.api.rillet.com`) and a remote MCP server at `https://api.rillet.com/mcp` using OAuth2.
